examples: Viktor Krum's wand is made of hornbeam (GF).
She padded across the road and towards the bushes the hornbeam trees, and there she stopped.
It matters not, 'she answered.' Go thou to-night, and stand under the branches of the hornbeam, and wait for my coming.
Formed of hornbeam and privet, they seem at first glance to be fairly familiar examples of traditional landscaping.
